## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Change class

- [ ] Editorial
- [ ] Template structure
- [ ] Authority-impacting
- [ ] Security-impacting

## Authority impact

State whether this changes any authority boundary.

```text
Authority impact: none | source | execution | evidence | receipt | verification | governance | presentation
```

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate-repo.sh` passes locally, or CI is the named validation mechanism.
- [ ] Required files remain present.
- [ ] No production secrets, customer data, or customer evidence were added.

## Failure language

Do not describe this repository as verified, production-ready, compliant, or proof-producing unless the exact verifier, artifact, receipt, or proof path is named.
